nasb.text: Moreover, the rest of the oil that is in the priest’s palm he shall put on the head of the one to be cleansed, to make atonement on his behalf before the Lord.

esv.text: And the rest of the oil that is in the priest’s hand he shall put on the head of him who is to be cleansed, to make atonement for him before the Lord.

cnv.text: 祭司把手中剩下的油，抹在那得潔淨的人的頭上，在耶和華面前為他贖罪。

ccb.text: 祭司要把手掌里剩下的油抹在他头上，在耶和华面前为他赎罪。
